====[[Pokémon Black and White Versions 2|Pokémon Black 2 and White 2]]====

=====Gives to new Trainers=====
In Black 2 and White 2, Bianca delivers one of these [[first partner Pokémon]] to the {{player}} on the behalf of [[Professor Juniper]].
{{Pokémon/Grid}}
{{Pokémon
|gen=5
|ndex=0495

=====[[Multi Battle]] partner=====
Bianca will join the player in a series of battles while traversing through [[Reversal Mountain]].

=====[[Pokémon World Tournament]]=====
Bianca uses three of these Pokémon in [[Pokémon battle|Single Battles]], four in [[Double Battle|Double]] and [[Rotation Battle]]s, and all six in [[Triple Battle]]s.
